title: Thoughts on 1/29/23 — sexuality, dream interrogation
html:
Direct continuation of the sexuality confusion arc — Yahir back in grants pass, processes another dream where he's making out with both an Ariana-Grande-like Latina girl and an unidentifiable male, and the male felt more engaging. Sober reflection on whether he's bisexual.

TL;DR

  • Most candid sexuality entry of 2023; Yahir lands on "I definitely like women, have never had a desire for a male in waking life, but appreciate male physiques like Da Vinci appreciated the human body."
  • Cites public/familial shame as the main reason he'd "prefer not to be bisexual" — names the cost honestly rather than the desire.
  • Plans not to talk to anyone about it, possibly therapist or anonymous app.
  • Closes: "I would prefer to stay on the road of seeking a women… Fuck life is a trip."
  • Connects to earlier 2023 01 25 Thoughts on 1242023 owen/ayden dream and forward to the 2023 03 01 Thoughts and Things on 22823 sauna entry where he fears being "outed" by the OSIG crew.
